content.content:
1	name: CI
2	
3	on:
4	  push:
5	    branches: [master]
6	  pull_request:
7	    branches: [master]
8	
9	concurrency:
10	  group: ${{ github.workflow }}-${{ github.ref }}
11	  cancel-in-progress: true
12	
13	env:
14	  DO_NOT_TRACK: 1
15	
16	jobs:
17	  ci:
18	    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
19	
20	    steps:
21	      - name: Checkout code
22	        uses: actions/checkout@v6
23	
24	      - name: Setup Node.js
25	        uses: actions/setup-node@v6
26	        with:
27	          node-version: "24"
28	
29	      - name: Setup PNPM
30	        uses: pnpm/action-setup@v4
31	
32	      - name: Get PNPM store directory
33	        shell: bash
34	        run: |
35	          echo "STORE_PATH=$(pnpm store path --silent)" >> $GITHUB_ENV
36	
37	      - name: Setup PNPM cache
38	        uses: actions/cache@v5
39	        with:
40	          path: ${{ env.STORE_PATH }}
41	          key: ${{ runner.os }}-pnpm-store-${{ hashFiles('**/pnpm-lock.yaml') }}
42	          restore-keys: |
43	            ${{ runner.os }}-pnpm-store-
44	
45	      - name: Setup Rust
46	        uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@stable
47	
48	      - name: Cache cargo dependencies
49	        uses: actions/cache@v5
50	        with:
51	          path: |
52	            ~/.cargo/bin/
53	            ~/.cargo/registry/index/
54	            ~/.cargo/registry/cache/
55	            ~/.cargo/git/db/
56	            packages/player/src-tauri/target/
57	          key: ${{ runner.os }}-cargo-${{ hashFiles('**/Cargo.lock') }}
58	
59	      - name: Install system dependencies
60	        run: |
61	          sudo apt-get update
62	          sudo apt-get install -y libwebkit2gtk-4.1-dev libappindicator3-dev librsvg2-dev patchelf
63	
64	      - name: Install dependencies
65	        run: pnpm install --frozen-lockfile
66	
67	      - name: Lint
68	        run: pnpm lint
69	
70	      - name: Test
71	        run: pnpm test
72	
73	      - name: Build
74	        run: pnpm build
75	        env:
76	          TAURI_SIGNING_PRIVATE_KEY: ${{ secrets.TAURI_SIGNING_PRIVATE_KEY }}
77	          TAURI_SIGNING_PRIVATE_KEY_PASSWORD: ${{ secrets.TAURI_SIGNING_PRIVATE_KEY_PASSWORD }}
78	          CODECOV_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.CODECOV_TOKEN }}

name: CI

on:
  push:
    branches: [master]
  pull_request:
    branches: [master]

concurrency:
  group: ${{ github.workflow }}-${{ github.ref }}
  cancel-in-progress: true

env:
  DO_NOT_TRACK: 1

jobs:
  ci:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest

    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v6

      - name: Setup Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v6
        with:
          node-version: "24"

      - name: Setup PNPM
        uses: pnpm/action-setup@v4

      - name: Get PNPM store directory
        shell: bash
        run: |
          echo "STORE_PATH=$(pnpm store path --silent)" >> $GITHUB_ENV

      - name: Setup PNPM cache
        uses: actions/cache@v5
        with:
          path: ${{ env.STORE_PATH }}
          key: ${{ runner.os }}-pnpm-store-${{ hashFiles('**/pnpm-lock.yaml') }}
          restore-keys: |
            ${{ runner.os }}-pnpm-store-

      - name: Setup Rust
        uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@stable

      - name: Cache cargo dependencies
        uses: actions/cache@v5
        with:
          path: |
            ~/.cargo/bin/
            ~/.cargo/registry/index/
            ~/.cargo/registry/cache/
            ~/.cargo/git/db/
            packages/player/src-tauri/target/
          key: ${{ runner.os }}-cargo-${{ hashFiles('**/Cargo.lock') }}

      - name: Install system dependencies
        run: |
          sudo apt-get update
          sudo apt-get install -y libwebkit2gtk-4.1-dev libappindicator3-dev librsvg2-dev patchelf

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: pnpm install --frozen-lockfile

      - name: Lint
        run: pnpm lint

      - name: Test
        run: pnpm test

      - name: Build
        run: pnpm build
        env:
          TAURI_SIGNING_PRIVATE_KEY: ${{ secrets.TAURI_SIGNING_PRIVATE_KEY }}
          TAURI_SIGNING_PRIVATE_KEY_PASSWORD: ${{ secrets.TAURI_SIGNING_PRIVATE_KEY_PASSWORD }}
          CODECOV_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.CODECOV_TOKEN }}

FROM node:24-bookworm

ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive
ENV DO_NOT_TRACK=1

RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y \
    curl \
    build-essential \
    pkg-config \
    libssl-dev \
    libwebkit2gtk-4.1-dev \
    libappindicator3-dev \
    librsvg2-dev \
    patchelf \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

RUN curl --proto '=https' --tlsv1.2 -sSf https://sh.rustup.rs | sh -s -- -y --default-toolchain stable && \
    . $HOME/.cargo/env

ENV PATH="/root/.cargo/bin:${PATH}"

RUN npm install -g pnpm

WORKDIR /app

COPY repo/ /app/

RUN pnpm install --frozen-lockfile

COPY run.sh /run.sh
RUN chmod +x /run.sh

ENTRYPOINT ["/run.sh"]
